title: dichanthelium filiramum
intro: Dichanthelium lepton, not Dichanthelium filiramum is a known plant species. Dichanthelium lepton, also known as Leptochloa leptoclada,  is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly found in North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its roots and stems exhibiting analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Dichanthelium lepton have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits including pain relief and reduced inflammation.
